data.name: Hentai City
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the Hentai City ! Ready to challenge your spirit and concentration? In this game, you'll immerse yourself in a simple yet colorful space, where your task is to find and connect pairs of similar images. With a arcade style, you'll enjoy endless moments of entertainment and challenge yourself at game.

Joining you on this journey is relaxing music, bringing a sense of comfort and tranquility.

Feature list :

Arcade style matching game.
Relaxing audio track.
Fullview mode after completing game.

Get ready for exciting and engaging experiences. Don't worry about time or scores, just enjoy the fun moments and immerse yourself in the colorful world of Hentai City!

data.short_description: Hentai City is a relaxing game with multiple sexy girls.This is a game of finding similar images, with a gentle, simple arcade style.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
